data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Monthly/annual billing with annual discount', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions an annual option with a discount, but there is no concrete evidence of the implementation of monthly billing or the application of an annual discount in the system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not demonstrate that both monthly and annual billing options are available with the specified discount.
gaps: No evidence of monthly billing implementation or confirmation of annual discount application.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
